get.summary: this service responses with the mapping of rooms and rates for a specified hotel

200.description: Valid request received. Check response for any errors.

post.summary: used to set rooms and rates availabilities

200.description: Valid request received. Check response for any errors.

400.description: Invalid request due to an not poorly formed dates range or  availability value less than 0. Check the body response for details

example.message: the availability must be greater than 0

post.summary: used to set rooms and rates restrictions

200.description: Valid request received. Check response for any errors.

400.description: This response means that either something required is missing or the hotel specified doesn't exist or the request is not formally valid

post.summary: used to set rooms and rates prices

200.description: Valid request received. Check response for any errors.

400.description: This response means that either something required is missing or the hotel specified doesn't exist or the request is not formally valid

example.message: minAge must be either greater or equal to 0

post.summary: used to retrieve the price planner

get.summary: used to get all reservations that belong to certain hotel and are either received or changed in the specified time interval, regardless of whether you have already read it or not

parameters.name: PCIBreplace
parameters.description: set this header to true to retrieve credit carda data in reservations

200.description: Request successful; if there isn't any reservation fot the specified period, the list of reservations will be empty; when the specified hotel doesn't extist, the response will contain only a warning instead

get.summary: used to get a single reservation details

parameters.name: PCIBreplace
parameters.description: set this header to true to retrieve credit carda data in reservations

200.description: Request successful; when neither the hotel or the reservation exist, then the body will be empty

get.summary: used to get all reservations that are either not acked or changed since the last read

parameters.name: PCIBreplace
parameters.description: set this header to true to retrieve credit carda data in reservations

200.description: Request successful; the response will contain only a warning when the hotel doesn't exist. When all reservations are already read, the body will be empty

example.message: The id hotel specified isn't numeric

post.summary: acknowledgement service; this service should be called after any type of reservation read operation to update the last read time for each reservation successful read

200.description: Valid request received. Check response for any errors.

example.message: The id hotel specified isn't numeric

ErrorDTO.description: contains all information about what's wrong with the last request submitted

message.description: a brief description of the error

InventoryRoomDTO.description: this object contains all information about a room and the available rate plans

roomName.description: hashmap with the name of the room in any languages configured

parentAvailRoomCode.description: (Optional) this field is present only if the availability of this room depends on another room

ratePlans.description: list of rates enabled on this room

xmlId.description: present only when the rate/room combination is independent by restriction; included for backward compatibility with the XML interface.

rateName.description: hashmap with the name of the rate in any languages configured

priceParent.description: (Optional) if the rate depends on another rate for the price, this field contains the code of that rate

minstayArrivalParent.description: (Optional) if the minstay arrival of this rate depends on the minstay arrival of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

minstayThroughParent.description: (Optional) if the minstay through of this rate depends on the minstay through of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

maxstayArrivalParent.description: (Optional) if the maxstay arrival of this rate depends on the maxstay arrival of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

maxstayThroughParent.description: (Optional) if the maxstay through of this rate depends on the maxstay through of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

closeArrivalParent.description: (Optional) if the close arrival of this rate depends on the close arrival of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

closeDepartureParent.description: (Optional) if the close departure of this rate depends on the close departure of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

closeRateParent.description: (Optional) if the close at room level of this rate depends on the close at room level of another rate, this field contains the code of that rate

RestrictionsRequestDTO.description: this object represents a request to change or apply new restrictions rules to rooms and rates in a specific period of time

roomCode.description: room code present in the mapping

rateRestrictions.description: this array contains the new configurations grouped by rates

rateCode.description: rate code present in the mapping

restrictionsIntervalsData.description: array of new configurations to be applied to the rate and rooms defined at higher level

RestrictionsDataPeriodDTO.description: this object contains a range of dates and a configuration of restrictions to be  applied to the entire period (included start and end day). It is possibile to submit values for dates not more then two years away from the current date.

from.description: start of period of days to change room and rate restrictions value

to.description: end of period of days to change room and rate restrictions.

RestrictionsDataDTO.description: restrictions data to be applied. It is possible to indicate only values to be modified, the others will remain to the value already set.

closed.description: when true the room is not available

BookingDTO.description: this object contains all data available of a single reservation

externalRefCode.description: reservation id belonging to the origin channel, if present. Can collide for different origin channel (i.e. Booking.com or Expedia bookings can have the same externalRefCode)

portalCode.description: the original code channel of the reservation. It could be either 'begain' or 'bedirect' or any other portal code that communicates the reservation

lastModifyDateTime.description: it's the date in UTC of the last reservation change

creationDateTime.description: it's the creation date in UTC of the reservation

type.description: credit card type: * 1 - American Express * 2 - Diners Club * 3 - Discover * 4 - JCB * 5 - Mastercard * 6 - Visa

expiration.description: expiration month/yead in the format MMYY

basePrice.description: this is the price of the reservation before applying a discount

totalPrice.description: reservation total price included all roomstays, taxes (when included), services, discount etc..

extraDetails.description: contains extra information at reservation level that may vary from case to case. We encourage you to add those infos to a "note" field for the hotel

message.description: contains a special request expressed by the client during the reservation, if any (optional)

notes.description: include the property's internal notes, if any

roomStays.description: contains information about all the nights in the reservation described by the top-level object

serviceIndexes.description: list of indexes; each one  refers to single service object

description.it: Accesso alla SPA durante il soggiorno
description.en: SPA free pass during the stay

PaymentDetailDTO.description: include the definition of the payment method

code.description: internal booking expert code associated to the payment method

cancTermIndex.description: required if this penalty clause is associated to a room

guestIndex.description: unique id used at roomstay level

primary.description: is true when the customer who booked the reservation is also present as guest

RoomStayDTO.description: represents a group of consecutive nights in the same room that belongs to a single reservation

roomCode.description: room booked; when there is a full derivation about availability (that means there isn't a room defined but only derivation rules), the code doesn't refer to the room itself but it refers to the indipent room from the point of view of availability

basePrice.description: this is the price of the roomstay before applying a discount

totalPrice.description: this is the price inclusive of discount, services or other

fixedQuote.description: fixed quote not related to a single day of the stay

fixedQuoteCancTermIndex.description: used as a reference to a cancellation term described in the corresponding bean

extraDetails.description: this object optionally contains data at roomstay-level provided by the portal

bedpref.description: include a textual description of the bed preferences, if any (optional)

serviceIndexes.description: list of indexes; each one  refers to single service object

GuestCountsDTO.description: it refers to guests involved either into the single roomstay or a service

guestIndexes.description: list of indexes; each one  refers to single guest object that contains all data available for that guest such first name, last name and other, and indicates the guest associated to the roomstay or service

currencyCode.description: currency code defined at hotel level (ISO 4217)

from.description: start date from which apply prices

to.description: end date of the period in which apply the specified prices. We manage only changes about dates at maximum two years away from the current date/

price.description: the price to apply for that period and room type

RoomAvailabilityDTO.description: this object contains a range of dates and a configuration of availabilities, grouped first by rooms and then by rates, to be applied to the entire period (included start and end day). It is possibile to submit values for dates not more then two years away from the current date.

datesRangeAndRoomAvailability.description: periods and availability to apply for the specified type of room

from.description: start date of the period in whici the availability of the specified room is to be modified.It is possible to submit values for dates not more than two years away from the current date.

to.description: end date of the period in which the availability is to be modified. It is possible to submit values for dates not more than two years away from the current date.

availability.description: number of the same type of room that is available in the specified period

serviceIndex.description: required if this service is purchased associated to a room

code.description: (Optional) Service code, as sent by the channel origin. You can request to map your own Service codes with ours. Ask our support dept for this.

status.description: Status of the service (REQUESTED, it's been requested to the hotel but not yet confirmed)

description.description: Service description in all configured languages.

checkout.description: (Optional) Checkout for the service, present when there id also a checkin date.

startTime.description: (Optional) is the service purchased is an hourly service, we will use this field instead of check in

endTime.description: (Optional) is the service is an hourly service, we will use this field instead of check out

duration.description: (Optional) Duration for the service. If present, checkout or endTime is omitted. ISO 8601 duration string

inclusive.description: True if service is included in total amounts

fixedQuote.description: (Optional) is a fixed fee included in the price of either a service or a rate

fixedQuoteCancTermIndex.description: used as a reference to a cancellation term described in the corresponding bean

dailyPrices.description: (Optional) when a service is purchased on a daily basis, this element contains the daily details of the service

amount.description: (Optional) Discount amount, applied to the base price. It is the unitary amount, not multiplied by the quantity.

percentage.description: (Optional) Discount percentage, applied to the base price. It is the unitary amount, not multiplied by the quantity.

basePrice.description: (Optional) Price with no discount applied. It is the unitary amount, not multiplied by the quantity.

totalPrice.description: (Optional) Total price (with all discounts / extras). It is the unitary amount, not multiplied by the quantity.

cancTermIndex.description: used as a reference to a cancellation term described in the corresponding bean

age.description: age of all the referred guest

quantity.description: number of guest with the same age
